overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character exploring a neon-lit futuristic urban environment at night. The character moves through a covered graffiti courtyard, transitions to an open plaza with palm trees, and ascends an outdoor escalator to an elevated walkway overlooking the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban courtyard with graffiti art

events.description: woman in blue shirt begins gesturing and taking photos with her phone

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered urban courtyard with vibrant graffiti covering the walls

notable_agents.action: woman in blue shirt taking photos or recording with her phone
two people sitting on a concrete bench against the graffiti wall

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint art and tags
wide concrete staircase with integrated yellow lighting
yellow LED strips along the base of walls and benches
long concrete seating with people resting against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered courtyard with walls covered in vibrant graffiti art. Several people are present: a woman in a blue shirt takes photos while others sit on illuminated concrete benches. Neon light strips line the walls, and a staircase is visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway transitioning to open plaza

events.description: exits the covered graffiti courtyard into the open urban plaza
begins ascending the wide concrete stairs toward the plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs leaving the graffiti courtyard behind

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and shorts descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible in the open plaza ahead
futuristic building with glass and concrete facade

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairs, transitioning from the covered courtyard to an open plaza. A man descends the stairs in the opposite direction. Palm trees and modern buildings become visible as the space opens up, with the lighting shifting from artificial to mixed natural night and neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and neon skyscrapers

events.description: emerging into open night with expansive neon city lights and skyscrapers visible
turning toward the escalator entrance of the modern building

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward a modern building with outdoor escalators

notable_agents.action: woman with blonde hair standing near a palm tree looking at her phone

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with cyan and magenta neon lighting
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building facades
outdoor escalator entrance with glowing yellow edge lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open plaza surrounded by palm trees and towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The environment is fully exposed to the night sky with vibrant cyan and magenta lighting from the buildings. The character approaches a modern building with an outdoor escalator while a woman stands nearby checking her phone.

events.description: stepping onto and ascending the outdoor escalator
reaching the top of the escalator and arriving at the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: riding up the escalator while the city view expands in the background

entered.detail: glowing yellow light strips along the escalator sides and handrails
dark entranceway at the top of the escalator

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the outdoor escalator between modern buildings. The plaza and palm trees fall away below as the cityscape expands into view. Yellow neon lights line the escalator rails, and the dark entrance at the top approaches as the camera rises.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking neon city street

events.description: arriving at the upper level walkway with view of the city street below
panning camera to view the street and surrounding skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: standing at the top of the escalator looking out over the neon-lit city street

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge with glass railings and concrete flooring
wet asphalt street with neon reflections visible below the walkway
towering skyscrapers with holographic displays and cyan lighting

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the top of the escalator on an elevated walkway overlooking the city. The camera pans to reveal a stunning view of the neon-lit street below and towering futuristic buildings with holographic displays. The space is quiet and empty, with glass railings providing views of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, graffiti-filled courtyard into an expansive, elevated vista of a neon-lit cyberpunk city. It begins by moving through a covered space lined with vibrant street art and illuminated benches where people linger under artificial neon strips. As the camera ascends a concrete staircase, the enclosed environment opens up into a wide plaza where the lighting shifts to a mix of night sky and glowing cyan and magenta hues reflected by towering skyscrapers and palm trees. The scene then transitions as the character boards an outdoor escalator, rising above the plaza while yellow neon rails frame the expanding cityscape. Finally, the camera reaches an elevated walkway, panning across glass railings to reveal a silent, panoramic view of the futuristic metropolis and its holographic displays.
